facts: Implementation was performed by Codex in an isolated local clone because the shared repository .git directory was read-only.
The Claude Code-specific /rigor:orchestrate command was not available and was not run.
No Claude Code session was performed; the Rigor CLI made no model/provider API call, and implementation occurred only in the already active Codex collaboration.
Preflight, contract, a validated routing-input.v2 assessment, routing plan, verification, and review evidence were recorded after the implementation diff existed.
An attempt artifact was not created because attempt-start is required before provider execution and a post-hoc artifact would misrepresent the implementation history.
Runtime model identity, reasoning effort, token usage, and provider cost are unavailable and unattested.

attempts.action: Run Codex-local implementation and repository tests without Claude Code
attempts.result: Local implementation and deterministic tests completed; independent dogfooding remains

speculation: The initial escalation thresholds may require adjustment after outcome data and independent review.
requestedDecision: After Claude Code becomes available, run /rigor:orchestrate dogfooding from a fresh preflight and attempt session, independently review the thresholds and selector policy, and rely on PR CI before merge.
